title: The Dawn of the Agent Age

mentions.quoted_text: Jensen told the press that the story was, in his words, nonsense.
mentions.context_snippet: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang had some complaints about how open AI was being run. Jensen told the press that the story was nonsense and that they will invest a huge amount in OpenAI.

mentions.quoted_text: I really love working with Sam.
mentions.context_snippet: Jensen Huang said he really loves working with Sam Altman and believes in OpenAI.

mentions.quoted_text: OpenAI inviting NVIDIA to invest up to $100 billion.
mentions.context_snippet: OpenAI is the AI company receiving large investments from NVIDIA and Disney, and is involved in partnerships and AI development.

mentions.quoted_text: The Wall Street Journal reported that NVIDIA's $100 billion investment announced last year wasn't going ahead.
mentions.context_snippet: The Wall Street Journal reported on the NVIDIA and OpenAI investment deal and related rumors.

facts.fact_value: NVIDIA's $100 billion investment in OpenAI not going ahead

mentions.quoted_text: The NVIDIA OpenAI deal has zero impact on our financial relationship with OpenAI.
mentions.context_snippet: Oracle responded to questions about its $300 billion contract with OpenAI and its financial relationship.

facts.fact_value: $300 billion over five years with OpenAI

mentions.quoted_text: Intel will soon produce their first range of GPUs designed for this AI era.
mentions.context_snippet: Intel announced plans to produce GPUs for AI workloads, hiring Eric Demers as chief GPU architect.

facts.fact_value: Eric Demers, former Qualcomm Senior VP of Engineering

mentions.quoted_text: The latest update for Apple's coding platform Xcode adds support for both Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs.
mentions.context_snippet: Xcode now supports agentic coding with Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs, enabling autonomous coding features.

facts.fact_value: Support for Clawed Agent and OpenAI's Codecs for agentic coding

mentions.quoted_text: A Clawed Code outage saw software engineer productivity absolutely plummet.
mentions.context_snippet: Clawed Code experienced an outage causing widespread errors and degraded API performance impacting developers.

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic did implement a patch within 20 minutes to get the service back online.
mentions.context_snippet: Anthropic is the company behind Clawed Code and Cloud Cowork, involved in AI agentic coding tools.

mentions.quoted_text: Disney has appointed a new CEO, Josh DiAmaro, to succeed Bob Iger beginning in March.
mentions.context_snippet: Disney is shifting focus to Experiences division and has a $1 billion stake in OpenAI.

mentions.quoted_text: The reason this company is so special is because of how creative we are and human beings that are generating that creativity.
mentions.context_snippet: Josh DiAmaro appointed CEO of Disney, emphasizing creativity and embracing technology including AI.

mentions.quoted_text: The You Can With AI podcast I host for KPMG.
mentions.context_snippet: KPMG is a sponsor and collaborator on AI podcasts focusing on enterprise AI deployment and strategy.

facts.fact_value: Sponsor and collaborator on AI podcast

mentions.quoted_text: Blitzy's differentiation starts with infinite code context and unmatched engineering velocity.
mentions.context_snippet: Blitzy is a platform for agentic software development lifecycle acceleration, sponsored in the episode.

mentions.quoted_text: Superintelligent deploys voice agents to interview people and provide AI adoption recommendations.
mentions.context_snippet: Superintelligent is a platform helping companies use AI better, sponsoring the episode.

mentions.quoted_text: I've done more personal coding projects over Christmas break than I have in the last 10 years.
mentions.context_snippet: David Holes tweeted about the shift in AI coding capabilities with models like Opus 4.5 and Cloud Code.

mentions.quoted_text: Models like Opus 4.5 and Cloud Code and GPT 5.2 Codex have fundamentally changed AI coding.
mentions.context_snippet: Opus 4.5 is a model referenced as part of the new wave of AI coding tools.

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic released Cloud Cowork, the Cloud Code for everyone else, built in 10 days by Cloud Code itself.
mentions.context_snippet: Cloud Code is an Anthropic software product for agentic coding, considered a watershed moment.

mentions.quoted_text: Cloud Cowork was built in about 10 days, mostly by Cloud Code itself.
mentions.context_snippet: Cloud Cowork is a product built by Anthropic's Cloud Code, enabling agentic coding for more users.

mentions.quoted_text: Brent Beshore from Permanent Equity wrote about agentic AI experiments and Cloud Cowork success.
mentions.context_snippet: Permanent Equity is an investment firm that experimented with agentic AI and praised Cloud Cowork.

mentions.quoted_text: OpenClaw is an assistant protocol for Cloud Code turning it into an assistant with access to computer services.
mentions.context_snippet: OpenClaw is a new software product that enables agentic assistants with access to user data and services.

mentions.quoted_text: Multbook built itself as the social network for AI agents, reaching over 1.5 million agents.
mentions.context_snippet: Multbook is a social network platform for AI agents, rapidly growing in users and conversations.

mentions.quoted_text: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said OpenClaw is not a passing fad and has high conviction in agentic assistants.
mentions.context_snippet: Sam Altman expressed strong belief in the future of agentic assistants like OpenClaw.

mentions.quoted_text: Meta announced it had acquired agent firm Manus and increased CapEx spend expectations.
mentions.context_snippet: Meta is investing in AI with acquisitions and increased capital expenditure, leading in AI wearables.

mentions.quoted_text: Microsoft was punished in the markets for not showing enough AI benefits flow through to cloud revenue.
mentions.context_snippet: Microsoft's earnings showed less AI impact than expected, affecting stock and bond prices.

mentions.quoted_text: Google announced the walkthrough version of Genie 3 World Model and confirmed Gemini powers Apple's on-device AI.
mentions.context_snippet: Google made key AI announcements including Gemini powering Apple devices and Genie 3 World Model.

mentions.quoted_text: Gemini would in fact be powering Apple's on-device AI.
mentions.context_snippet: Gemini is a model powering Apple's on-device AI, confirmed in early 2026.

mentions.quoted_text: New models from Alibaba's Kuen were noted in the Chinese AI model space.
mentions.context_snippet: Kuen is a Chinese AI model from Alibaba, part of the competitive AI landscape.

mentions.quoted_text: Moonshot's Kimi K25 is one of the first leading open-weight multimodal models with agent swarms.
mentions.context_snippet: Kimi K25 is a Chinese open-weight multimodal AI model with advanced features like agent swarms.

mentions.quoted_text: OpenAI was concerned about Anthropic moving before them and pushing to get public in Q4 2026.
mentions.context_snippet: OpenAI plans to go public in late 2026 amid competition with Anthropic and SpaceX's XAI.

mentions.quoted_text: SpaceX merged with XAI and its Grok platform, possibly to play spoiler in public markets.
mentions.context_snippet: SpaceX acquired XAI and its Grok platform, potentially impacting AI model lab IPO dynamics.

mentions.quoted_text: XAI and its Grok platform are now owned by SpaceX after a merger.
mentions.context_snippet: XAI is an AI model lab merged with SpaceX, with Grok as its platform.

mentions.quoted_text: Anthropic explained why Claude will remain ad free.
mentions.context_snippet: Claude is an AI model by Anthropic that will remain ad free despite advertising discussions.

mentions.quoted_text: Rumors of new models coming including Sonnet 5 or Opus 4.6, GPT 5.3, Gemini 3 Pro.
mentions.context_snippet: Sonnet 5 is a rumored upcoming AI model expected in 2026.

mentions.quoted_text: Rumors of new models coming including GPT 5.3.
mentions.context_snippet: GPT 5.3 is a rumored upcoming version of the GPT model series.

mentions.quoted_text: Rumors of new models coming including Gemini 3 Pro.
mentions.context_snippet: Gemini 3 Pro is a rumored upcoming advanced version of the Gemini model.

mentions.quoted_text: Feb is the month of AI shipping. Enjoy it :)
mentions.context_snippet: Logan Kilpatrick tweeted about February being the month of AI shipping.

notes: All URLs mentioned in the transcript are either generic or not provided, so source_url is null except for Blitzy where a URL was given.
Mentions of social media posts are assigned platform 'X' when Twitter is clearly referenced.
Some entities like 'Cloud Code' and 'Clawed Code' are treated as software products given their described functionality.
No new entity types were identified beyond the locked taxonomy.
Sponsorship mentions are marked as is_editorial=true as they are paid content.
Sentiment labels are assigned based on the tone and context of mentions.
